title: User not logged in due to unconfirmed account
symptom: After signing up, the user is unable to write to the Supabase profiles table because they are not logged in. This occurs if the account confirmation is required.
not_this_if: User is logged in before filling out the profile
root_cause: When account confirmation is enabled in Supabase, users must confirm their email before they can be fully authenticated and logged in. This prevents them from accessing certain functionalities until the confirmation is completed.
agent_instruction: Disable the email confirmation requirement in Supabase to allow automatic login after signup.
